title: vitis coriacea
intro: Vitis coriacea, also known as the rough-barked grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vitis coriacea include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Vitis coriacea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
